settings.heading: Stability & Comfort
settings.body: The semi-recumbent seating position distributes your weight evenly across the frame, reducing pressure on wrists and lower back. Three 20×4" fat tyres absorb bumps while providing unmatched stability.

settings.text: Ergonomic mesh-back seat with lumbar support
Fat tyre suspension absorbs all terrain

settings.heading: Power & Range
settings.body: Choose between a cadence sensor for relaxed cruising or a torque sensor for a natural ride feel. The 48V 17.5Ah Samsung-cell battery delivers up to 80km of pedal-assisted range.

settings.heading: Inclusive by Design
settings.body: The Trident is built for every body. A low step-over frame, adjustable seat position, and intuitive controls mean riders of all abilities can enjoy the freedom of cycling — independently.

settings.text: Low step-over height for easy mounting
Free test rides available at all dealers
